GP.title: Homework for February 10:1. Read an article about the roles people play in social change https://www.opendemocracy.net/en/transformation/what-role-were-you-born-to-play-in-social-change/2. Choose a role (or two roles) that you play in your community (school, family, friends circle etc.)3. Justify your answer in 200-250 words essay, where you need to use direct quotes from the article using Quote Sandwich method. Quotes from the article do not go into word count. No make-up assignments, bring your essays to the class. If you are absent send it via EduPage. If not, then 0 for assessment.

Homework for February 24:- Prepare your research proposalsThis task cannot have extended deadlines, so please, submit it on time! This is your semester project. Those who were absent today please carefully read the presentation slides and have your proposals ready for the lesson. I won't accept an excuse of you being absent.
